_comment: AI agent configuration for the extraction pipeline. Edit model/temperature here — no code changes needed.

data_extraction.description: Extracts structured facts from PDF research text

verification.description: Verifies extracted facts against source text

document_topic_analyzer.description: Classifies which research topics a document covers

custom_prompt_generator.description: Generates extraction prompts for custom research topics

custom_topic_interpreter.description: Interprets and expands custom research topic descriptions

custom_search_term_generator.description: Generates search terms for custom research topics

citation_extraction.description: Extracts structured citation metadata (authors, year, journal, DOI) from PDF markdown text
